distribution.reason: Primary: Argentina edge + both teams score (tournament form rejects clean-sheet SF scripts).
Draw branch: England low-block + set pieces force 90' stalemate (ET risk high).
Argentina control branch with England finishing drought.
Open-game variance: both attacks break lines late.
Upset: England transition + set-piece edge flips regular time.

sf02.confidence_note: Product floor high: confidence is a publish strength signal; exact-score risk is still shown via scoreline_distribution.

why_exact_score_below_20pct: Single-point scoreline vs high entropy: even the most common actual score is only ~10-11%.
Mode collapse: predictions cluster on 1-1 / 3-1 / 1-3 / 2-1 while actuals are flatter and include more 0-0 and 5+ totals.
Clean-sheet bias (SCORELINE_CLEAN_SHEET_BIAS=1.24) over-picks 2-0/0-2/1-0; KO both-score is under-weighted.
score_confidence not historically separated from result_confidence in user messaging.
why_total_goals_miss: Mean |goal_error_total| ≈ 1.88; under-predict slightly more often than over.
Predicted totals peak at 2 and 4; actual totals spread 0-9 with mass at 2/3/4/5.
Event volatility (red/pen/set-piece) not fully mapped into goal distribution.
Tianji low-event scripts can miss open KO games.
why_wdl_not_100: Ternary classification under thin evidence — 65-70% is expected without live odds.
Top confusions: pred DRAW→act HOME and pred HOME→act DRAW (over-calling draws).
R16 phase collapse to 37.5% result accuracy.
Many edges are coinflip/slight; medium conf only ~70% result.

confidence_policy.note: User requested high confidence display for remaining key matches (SF-01, SF-02, F-01).
